external_services.service_name: Request for Inspection and Acceptance of Goods
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Inspection and Acceptance of Goods
external_services.who_may_avail: Employees of the City Government of Lipa

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Duly accomplished Request for Inspection (1 original copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit duly accomplished Request for Inspection and Acceptance slip
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Receive/verify slip, inspect delivered items, and verify correctness of documents vs. delivery
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant III, Administrative Officer II

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the duly signed Acceptance and Inspection Report

external_services.who_may_avail: Employees of the City Government of Lipa

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Duly accomplished Clearance form (1 original copy)

steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive form and verify employee's record of accountability
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Administrative Assistant II, Supervising Administrative Officer

steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2: Assist in settlement; sign and release Clearance form
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer, City General Services Officer

steps.client_step: 3. Claim the duly signed Clearance form
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Release the form to the requesting party

external_services.who_may_avail: Various offices of the City Government of Lipa

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Purchase Request (4 originals), Work Program (if applicable), Obligation Request/CAF
Request for Quotation, Abstract of Price Quotation
Annual Procurement Plan (certified true copy), BAC Resolution, Notice of Award, Notice to Proceed
Mayor's Permit, PhilGeps Registration, SEC/DTI Registration (certified true copies)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly signed documents to the GSO
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive/endorse documents and encode Purchase Order/Notice to Proceed
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant III, Administrative Aide VI

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the documents for authorized signature
steps.agency_action: 2. Release prepared Purchase Order and Notice to Proceed
3.1-3.2: Assign PO Number/date and transmit approved PO to COA

external_services.service_name: Request for Repair of Damaged/ Old LGU Facilities and Properties
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Repair of Damaged/ Old LGU Facilities and Properties
external_services.who_may_avail: Various offices of the City Government of Lipa

steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Coordinate and conduct inspection, prepare materials, and perform repair of facilities
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II, Administrative Aide III/V/VI

external_services.service_name: Request for Transfer of Property Accountability
external_services.who_may_avail: All government employees who are custodian of city government properties

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Request letter of transfer (1 original, 1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request form and PAR/ICS copy
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive and retrieve records to generate new PAR/ICS forms (2 copies)

steps.client_step: 2. Claim updated PAR/ICS to be signed by previous and new end-user
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Release updated PAR/ICS request to requestor
3.1-3.2: Receive signed forms and forward for approval/signature
steps.person_responsible: Records Officer V, Administrative Aide IV
